+project: card-comments
+title: Route comment ops through dispatch, register in schema, and add command YAML
+---
+## What
+Wire the comment command structs into the op dispatch + schema so `{"op": "add comment", ...}`, `list comments`, `get comment`, `update comment`, `delete comment` are reachable end to end. The `Noun::Comment`/`Comments` enum entries and `is_valid` (verb,noun) pairs ALREADY EXIST in `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/types/operation.rs` (lines ~96-97, ~144-145, ~281-283) â€” do NOT re-add them; this task connects them to the implementations.
+
+Files:
+1. `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/dispatch.rs`:
+   - Add `async fn execute_comment_operation(processor, ctx, op)` modeled on `execute_attachment_operation` (~line 849). Map `Verb::Add â†’ AddComment`, `Verb::List â†’ ListComments`, `Verb::Get â†’ GetComment`, `Verb::Update â†’ UpdateComment`, `Verb::Delete â†’ DeleteComment`. Use the same `req`/`req_task_id`/`op.get_string` helpers. The actor for `add comment` should default to the op's actor (`op.actor`) when not explicitly passed â€” check how `execute_operation` derives `processor` from `op.actor` and reuse that as the comment author when `actor` param is absent.
+   - Add the match arm to `execute_operation`'s `match op.noun` (~line 928): `Noun::Comment | Noun::Comments => execute_comment_operation(&processor, ctx, op).await,` â€” currently it falls through to the `_ => unsupported operation` arm.
+2. `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/schema.rs`:
+   - Import the five comment structs and add them to the `KANBAN_OPERATIONS` static list (in a `// Comment` group, mirroring the `// Attachment` group at ~line 67).
+   - Add an example to `generate_kanban_examples()` (e.g. add comment to a task).
+3. `crates/swissarmyhammer-kanban/builtin/commands/comment.yaml` â€” new command YAML modeled on `builtin/commands/attachment.yaml` (context-menu entries for comment actions if appropriate; at minimum keep it consistent with how attachment.yaml registers commands). Confirm command YAMLs are dynamically loaded (include_dir) so the new file is picked up.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] `execute_operation` routes `Noun::Comment | Noun::Comments` to the comment handler (no longer "unsupported operation").
+- [ ] All five comment ops appear in the generated MCP schema `op` enum and in `x-operation-schemas`.
+- [ ] An `add comment` example appears in the schema examples.
+- [ ] `add comment` with no explicit `actor` records the dispatching actor as author.
+- [ ] `cargo clippy -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -- -D warnings` clean.
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] In `dispatch.rs` test module: parse + execute `{"op":"add comment","task_id":...,"text":"hi"}` end to end against a temp board, then `{"op":"list comments","task_id":...}` returns the member. Assert round-trip through `parse_input` â†’ `execute_operation`.
+- [ ] In `schema.rs` test module: extend the existing `test_kanban_operations_returns_full_list`-style assertions to require `add comment`, `list comments`, `get comment`, `update comment`, `delete comment` in the op enum, and `x-operation-schemas` count matches ops.
+- [ ] Test that `add comment` without an `actor` param attributes the dispatching actor.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban` â€” green.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` â€” write the dispatch round-trip + schema-enum assertions first; they fail until routing/registration is added.
\ No newline at end of file
